description: Call GET /api/imdb/streaming-picks-query/v1 for IMDb Streaming Picks through JustOneAPI.

operations.description: Get IMDb streaming Picks data, including curated titles available across streaming surfaces, for content discovery and watchlist research.

parameters.description:
Language and country preferences.

Available Values:
- `en_US`: English (US)
- `fr_CA`: French (Canada)
- `fr_FR`: French (France)
- `de_DE`: German (Germany)
- `hi_IN`: Hindi (India)
- `it_IT`: Italian (Italy)
- `pt_BR`: Portuguese (Brazil)
- `es_ES`: Spanish (Spain)
- `es_US`: Spanish (US)
- `es_MX`: Spanish (Mexico)
parameters.name: languageCountry
